title: skills:get-skill
description: Use case for retrieving a single skill by name.
context: Use case for retrieving a single skill by name.

rules:
The output MUST be a discriminated union:

```typescript
type GetSkillOutput = { skill: Skill } | { error: 'NOT_FOUND' }
```

The use case MUST call `SkillRepository.get(input.name)`:

- If the skill exists, return `{ skill: Skill }`
- If the skill does not exist, return `{ error: 'NOT_FOUND' }`

constraints: The name parameter MUST be validated as non-empty.

scenarios.name: Returns skill or not found error
then: the result is either the Skill object or a NOT_FOUND error.

scenarios.name: Delegates to repository
then: it calls SkillRepository.get() with the provided name.

scenarios.name: Valid skill name
when: GetSkill use case is executed with { name: 'skill-name' }

scenarios.name: Invalid skill name
when: GetSkill use case is executed with { name: 'nonexistent' }
